series_metadata.series_title: Water Pollution Control Loan Fund Record
series_metadata.series_description: These files are loans to communities to construct- ion wastewater treatment facilities and are to be reimbursed to the State of Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating unit until final administrative inspection is completed, and final loan disbursement is made. Then retain State Records Center three years after date of final loan disbursement, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
